summary: Completed testing of Presqu'accident module refactoring. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly - 5 stats cards, simplified creation form, treatment dialog with all fields, new statuses, numero format YYYY-NNN.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly generates numero format YYYY-NNN (e.g., 2026-001) on creation
Backend correctly forces status to A_TRAITER on creation (line 121 in presqu_accident_routes.py)
Frontend correctly displays 5 stats cards with new statuses (Total, À traiter, En cours, Terminés, Risque résiduel)
Frontend creation form correctly excludes treatment fields (Actions de prévention, Responsable action, Date échéance action, Commentaire)
Frontend treatment dialog correctly includes all treatment fields with status dropdown
Frontend correctly implements permission restriction - fields disabled when user is not responsable
Frontend list correctly displays numero in left column with N° prefix
Frontend ClipboardCheck icon correctly opens treatment dialog
Frontend status filter dropdown includes all 4 new statuses
seed_data_creation: Created test presqu'accidents during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Presqu'accident module refactoring fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Stats endpoint returns 5 categories (total, a_traiter, en_cours, termine, risque_residuel), 2) Creation generates numero in YYYY-NNN format, 3) Creation form excludes treatment fields, 4) Treatment dialog contains all treatment fields + status dropdown with 4 values, 5) Permission restriction works (fields disabled for non-responsable), 6) List shows numero in left column, 7) ClipboardCheck opens treatment dialog, 8) Status filter uses new statuses. Old items without numero display 'N° -' as expected.

stats_5_cards.test: Verify 5 stats cards display (Total, À traiter, En cours, Terminés, Risque résiduel)
stats_5_cards.evidence: Backend returns global.total, global.a_traiter, global.en_cours, global.termine, global.risque_residuel. Frontend displays 5 cards in grid-cols-5.

numero_format_YYYY_NNN.test: Verify numero auto-generates in format YYYY-NNN
numero_format_YYYY_NNN.evidence: Created item received numero '2026-003' matching pattern. Backend generates at line 116: f'{current_year}-{str(count + 1).zfill(3)}'

creation_form_simplified.test: Verify creation form excludes Actions de prévention, Responsable action, Date échéance action, Commentaire
creation_form_simplified.evidence: Screenshot shows creation form without treatment fields. Form contains: Titre, Description, Date incident, Lieu, Service, Sévérité, Personnes impliquées, Déclarant, Responsable du traitement, Contexte/Cause probable, Actions proposées, Pièces jointes

list_numero_left_column.test: Verify numero displayed in left column of list
list_numero_left_column.evidence: Screenshot shows items with 'N° 2026-001', 'N° 2026-002' in gray boxes on left. Old items show 'N° -'

clipboard_check_opens_treatment.test: Verify ClipboardCheck icon opens treatment dialog
clipboard_check_opens_treatment.evidence: Clicking purple ClipboardCheck button opens 'Traitement du presqu'accident' dialog

treatment_dialog_fields.test: Verify treatment dialog contains Actions de prévention, Responsable action, Date échéance action, Commentaire, Status
treatment_dialog_fields.evidence: Screenshot shows all fields: Statut dropdown, Actions de prévention textarea, Responsable de l'action input, Date d'échéance input, Commentaire textarea, Pièces jointes du traitement section

status_dropdown_4_values.test: Verify status dropdown has 4 new values (À traiter, En cours, Terminé, Risque résiduel)
status_dropdown_4_values.evidence: Backend accepts all 4 status values. Frontend SelectContent contains all 4 SelectItems (lines 820-824 in PresquAccidentList.jsx)

status_filter_new_values.test: Verify status filter uses new statuses
status_filter_new_values.evidence: Screenshot shows filter dropdown with: Tous, À traiter, En cours, Terminé, Risque résiduel

permission_restriction.test: Verify treatment fields disabled for non-responsable users
permission_restriction.evidence: Screenshot shows fields disabled and only 'Fermer' button (not 'Valider le traitement') when user is not responsable

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/presqu_accident_page.png - Main page with 5 stats cards and list
